data.body:
P2 (inbound link direction) — IMPLEMENTED, TESTED, LIVE-VALIDATED, COMMITTED (worktree fix/jira-reconciler-sync, commit 1aa344ee1; NOT pushed to Gerrit — holding for user go).

Fix (bug 4b59):
- Corrected direction at BOTH sites: inbound_differ._diff_links_inbound + outbound_links._diff_link_removals. outwardIssue Blocks -> blocks; inwardIssue Blocks -> depends_on (live-Jira truth).
- Added _resolve_inbound_link helper + _INVERSE_RELATION (mirrored const, pinned by shared test).
- Inverse-aware CROSS-TICKET dedup (threads local_tickets_by_id into _diff_links_inbound) + active-set guard: skip counterpart absent from `rebar list --full` (archived/deleted excluded — the footgun). Prevents ~400 mirror-adds.
- Removal path: correcting direction re-enables managed-unlink propagation that the inversion had silently disabled (wrong relation failed the managed_refs gate) — safely gated by should_propagate_removal (managed_refs only).

Anti-chronic-pattern: NEW test_link_direction_absolute.py asserts ABSOLUTE direction against CAPTURED LIVE-JIRA fixtures (tests/fixtures/jira/live_ground_truth/REB-458+461), not round-trip consistency (the oracle class invariant under double inversion that let 3f04/c8ed/3b86 ship inverted). Corrected the reversed-convention fixtures in test_link_dedup, test_link_removal_sync, test_link_sync, test_reconcile_roundtrip.

Validation: 1284 reconciler unit tests pass; lint+typecheck clean; RED->GREEN confirmed (RED for the right reason on inverted code). LIVE: real fixed _diff_links_inbound on 54 real REB tickets with the active map -> 0 emits (converged, no cycle-rejects, no mirrors).

NEXT: P1 comment pagination (get_comments multi-page parse) RED->GREEN + live-verify; observability (promote RECONCILER_FAIL_SILENT_NOOP + count comment_errors); then Gerrit land (stacked) gated on user go + live fix-verification; Jira comment cleanup AFTER P1 deploys.
